entity.summary: Cosmos-SDK app-chain and decentralized exchange launched in June 2021 as an interchain liquidity hub. Osmosis remained active after a June 2022 liquidity-pool bug was exploited for about $5 million and validators halted the chain while a fix and reimbursement process were prepared.
entity.notes: Entity-level record covering the Osmosis chain and its principal DEX identity. The launch date is stored at month precision because the strongest official retrospective sources establish June 2021 rather than one universally cited launch day.

events.title: Osmosis launched as a Cosmos interchain DEX
events.description: Osmosis launched in June 2021 as an application-specific blockchain and decentralized exchange designed around automated market making, liquidity provision and IBC-connected assets.
events.notes: Stored at month precision; official retrospectives consistently identify June 2021 as the launch period.

events.title: Liquidity-pool bug exploited and Osmosis chain halted
events.description: A critical bug in Osmosis liquidity pools was exploited for an estimated $5 million on 2022-06-08. Validators halted the chain to contain the incident, developers prepared a fix, and later Osmosis ecosystem retrospectives described affected liquidity providers as fully repaid.
events.notes: The chain halt was temporary; the entity remains active.

evidence.title: Osmosis to host first-ever Mars Protocol Red Bank Outpost
evidence.notes: Official ecosystem retrospective identifying the DEX's June 2021 launch.

evidence.title: Osmosis official application
evidence.notes: Current official application confirming continued operation.

evidence.title: Osmosis Chain Halted Amid Possible $5M Exploit
evidence.notes: Contemporaneous report establishing the exploit date, estimated loss and emergency chain halt.

evidence.title: Osmosis after One Year: Achievements and Future Directions
evidence.notes: Official ecosystem retrospective describing the LP exploit as fully repaid and documenting subsequent security and testing improvements.

evidence.title: Osmosis application archive index
evidence.notes: Archive index retained for historical website continuity.
